entry.title: My first malware (Windows Process Injection)
entry.summary: TLDR What ?? Malware ?? No more pentesting ?? (Boring backstory) Well… kinda (yes). I’ll make this short but, as I’ve started my cybersecurity journey back in 2020 with penetration testing, web application security and various CTF (mainly on HackTheBox), let’s say I got tremendously a bit bored. I was starting to run out of ideas and doing boxes after boxes made me realize it was time ...

entry.title: HackTheBox - Wifinetic (Easy)
entry.summary: HTB Easy Machine : Wifinetic Fast review of the machine : Wifinetic was a relatively simple box but still funny enough because of the memories it brought back. I will start by discovering a FTP share with anonymous login enabled, which contains an interesting backup archive file among other PDF files. The backup will leak me a password that I will reuse to gain a foothold on the machine as ...

entry.title: HackTheBox - RedPanda (Easy)
entry.summary: HTB Easy Machine : RedPanda Fast review of the machine : RedPanda was an easy-rated Linux HTB box made by Woodenk. During our initial nmap scan we discover the port 8080 that hosts the main application of this box, we discover a field input and manage to exploit it using SSTI. Having remote code execution we can either get the user flag directly or get a reverse shell using a msfvenom paylo...
